message:
feat(interactive): add streaming markdown fence stabilization for live rendering

Adds logic to detect and close unterminated code fences during streaming output,
so partial markdown renders predictably while tokens are still arriving:

- parse_fence_line(): Parse CommonMark fenced code block opening/closing with
  up to 3 leading spaces, backtick/tilde markers, and info string validation
- streaming_unclosed_fence(): Track open/close fence state across lines to detect
  unterminated fences at the end of a streaming markdown buffer
- stabilize_streaming_markdown(): Append a synthetic closing fence when streaming
  content has an unclosed code block, returning Cow::Borrowed when no fixup needed
- Refactored push_wrapped_plain_line into the new fence-aware rendering pipeline

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
